title: [Course/Subject] Assessment Template
description: A customizable assessment test. Replace this with your description.
author: [Your Name/Organization]

1.text: This is a sample multiple-choice question. What is 2 + 2?

2.text: True or False: The sky is blue on a clear day.

3.text: Which of these are primary colors? (Select all that apply)

5.text: This is a sample constructed response prompt. Describe your reasoning for the previous question.
5.rubric: 2 points: Clear and accurate reasoning. 1 point: Partial reasoning. 0 points: Blank or completely incorrect.
